# R John Victor Portfolio

> Solutions Engineer portfolio focused on full-stack, platform, cloud, and real-time systems engineering.

R John Victor is a Solutions Engineer with 8+ years of experience building enterprise software, cloud-native platforms, and scalable full-stack applications.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/): Canonical root
- [Home (English)](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en): Main localized entry point
- [Home (Hindi)](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/hi): Hindi localized entry point
- [Home (Tamil)](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/ta): Tamil localized entry point

## Navigation Anchors (EN)

- [About](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#about): Background and quick facts
- [Skills](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#skills): Core technologies and domains
- [Experience](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#experience): Career progression and scope
- [Achievements](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#achievements): Outcome-focused highlights
- [Education](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#education): Academic background
- [Featured Work](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#featured-work): Flagship project portfolio
- [Technical Contributions](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#technical-contributions): Engineering/platform contributions
- [Philosophy](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#philosophy): Principles and approach
- [Contact](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/en#contact): Contact and profile links

## Structured Resources

- [sitemap.xml](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/sitemap.xml): Crawlable URL inventory
- [robots.txt](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/robots.txt): Crawl directives
- [manifest.webmanifest](https://www.rjohnvictor.com/manifest.webmanifest): PWA metadata
